agentSpans.name: invoke_agent Strands Agents
agentSpans.input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use both the get_weather tool AND the get_time tool for Paris. Call both tools exactly once each.
agentSpans.output:
<thinking>I have received the weather and time for Paris. I can now provide this information to the User.</thinking>

The weather in Paris is currently cloudy with a temperature of 62F. The time in Paris is 8:00 AM CET.

name: agentcore-parallel-tools
input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use both the get_weather tool AND the get_time tool for Paris. Call both tools exactly once each.
output:
<thinking>I have received the weather and time for Paris. I can now provide this information to the User.</thinking>

The weather in Paris is currently cloudy with a temperature of 62F. The time in Paris is 8:00 AM CET.
